Octane Street Racer

Solo arcade mode — vertical road racer with gear shifting, boost, and near-miss scoring.

🏁 Solo Arcade

Full arcade loop. Race traffic, shift gears, boost past rivals.

Pilot

Controls

↑ / W accelerate   ↓ / S brake
← / → steer
A shift up   Z shift down
Space nitro   K KERS boost   M mute
Perfect shift at 9–9.5k RPM. Near misses build a x5 combo.
Fuel is your timer — grab gas cans, mind the rain.
Brake to charge KERS; hold K to deploy it. Engine & tyres heat up — keep them in the zone.
Gamepad: LStick steer · RT/A accel · LT/B brake · X nitro · RB KERS
